# p5js React TypeScript Project

This project is a build harness for creating p5js sketches using React, TypeScript, and Vite.

## Project Structure

- Built with Vite for fast development and building
- Uses React as the UI framework
- TypeScript for type safety
- p5js for creative coding sketches
- React-p5 wrapper for integrating p5js with React

## Development Commands

- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build

## Creating New Sketches

Add new sketch files in the `src/sketches/` directory and import them in `App.tsx`.
